summary:
ISS-1302 assigned to analyst to add a third-horn closure to WIN-053 detail_evidence paragraph 2 addressing the metaphysical/aetheric retreat defense that EXP-194's two-horn disjunction left unrebutted on-page. EXP-219 provides a single-sentence insertion after the substring 'only a relabelling of it).' that (a) credits the aetheric retreat as the defender's strongest remaining move, (b) shows that waiving interior flux conservation unmoors A, C, and λ from toroidal geometry so B(r) demotes to a parameterless surface fit, (c) cross-references §6.1 using the existing #p6-61-1 anchor already in tldr_verdict, and (d) concludes that the toroidal geometry does no predictive work in the retreat branch. The patch is a string replace on the verbatim unique substring 'only a relabelling of it).

' (verified occurrence = 1). No TLDRs, detail_verdict_text, detail_claim, or detail_extra touched. Please integrate and close ISS-1302.
